ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Unique ticker symbol for the security */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the security operates */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the security operates */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the security is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures (CUSIP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of index (e.g., price-weighted, market-capitalization-weighted) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_indexes" (
  "security_index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the security in the index */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the security was added to the index */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the security will be removed from the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_indexes_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES indexes ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_indexes_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES securities ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "holders" (
  "holder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holder */,
  "holder_name" TEXT /* Name of the holder */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of holder (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "institutional_type" TEXT /* Type of institutional holder (e.g., mutual fund, pension fund) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the holder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_holders" (
  "security_holder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security */,
  "holder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holder */,
  "holding_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the security held by the holder */,
  "holding_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares held by the holder */,
  "reporting_date" TEXT /* Date when the holding was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_holder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_holders_holder_id FOREIGN KEY ("holder_id") REFERENCES holders ("holder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_holders_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES securities ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security */,
  "different_entries" INTEGER /* Number of different entries for the security */,
  "different_value" REAL /* Value of changes for the security */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the entry was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES securities ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the security */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date for which the price is recorded */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the security traded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES securities ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news item */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news item */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news item */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES securities ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the financial report was published */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue reported */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit reported */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets reported */,
  "liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities reported */,
  "equity" REAL /* Total equity reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES securities ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm the analyst works for */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., Buy, Hold, Sell) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was issued */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price set by the analyst */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation provided by the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES securities ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the security data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES securities ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price predicted by the analyst */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analyst's prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES securities ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_analysis" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security */,
  "scenario_date" TEXT /* Date the scenario was created */,
  "best_case" REAL /* Best-case scenario for the security */,
  "base_case" REAL /* Base-case scenario for the security */,
  "worst_case" REAL /* Worst-case scenario for the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_analysis_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES securities ("symbol")
)
